title: nvm_list skips all objects after first
description: nvm_list passes start_id = out_id + 1 on each iteration. The wolfHSM NvmList API requires start_id to be an existing ID (or 0); it searches for an exact match and returns the NEXT object after it. When start_id = out_id + 1 and that value is not an existing ID, the server finds no match and returns count=0, id=0, terminating the loop. Result: only the first NVM object is ever returned; all subsequent objects are silently dropped. Fix: pass start_id = out_id (unchanged) instead of out_id + 1, matching the pattern in the wolfHSM demo and test code.
